name: Backend Route Creation
description: Add new Express REST API routes with proper validation, error handling, and auth middleware.
checklist: Add requireAuth middleware to all new routes
Validate all required input fields with early 400 return
Return { ok: true, ... } on success and { ok: false, error: '...' } on failure
Use existing findProject() / findRun() helpers for lookups
Add route inside createForgeRouter() closure (not outside)
Use forgeRunStore methods for persistence — never write JSON directly
Never expose raw filesystem paths in API responses
common_failure_modes: Route defined outside createForgeRouter() closure (no access to helpers)
Path parameter name mismatch between route and req.params
Forgetting to handle the 404 case when resource not found
output_format: Express router.verb() call inside createForgeRouter closure
